productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Printed Beige T-shirt
description: Composition Beige round neck T-shirt made of 50% polyester and 50% cotton, has short sleeves, a ribbed neckline and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery mark taylor's fresh take on the classic T-shirt resulted in this piece. A cool print with a vintage vibe, these are perfect to wear under a structured blazer and fitted denims. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
